name: Hamlet
short_description: Hamlet; is a Turn based Roguelike RPG in an open world with light survival elements.
detailed_description:
Buzz

With a complete overhaul and completion of the core game components. Hamlet is ready for more feedback!


About the Game

Hamlet: Have you ever wanted to explore an interactive world. In Hamlet you will create a hamlet, but first you must survive. You could collect tools and resources to help expand your new world. Soon your world will expand, and you will have more things to manage. Explore your world as you find new resources and challenges that await our intrepid explorer. Once you feel you have found a place to call home, settle down, start a family, and build a community. The larger you grow the more you will be responsible for. You can't compete with the big towns and castles out there in the larger world. However, your little piece of home is yours and someday you may get help in building your home into a community with like-minded folks. Soon they will want to expand into a larger community until you’re finally ready to establish your very own Hamlet.

Hamlet: Have you ever wanted to explore an interactive world.

In Hamlet you will create a hamlet, but first you must survive. You could collect tools and resources to help expand your new world.

Soon your world will expand, and you will have more things to manage. Explore your world as you find new resources and challenges that await our intrepid explorer.

Once you feel you have found a place to call home, settle down, start a family, and build a community.

The larger you grow the more you will be responsible for. You can't compete with the big towns and castles out there in the larger world. However, your little piece of home is yours and someday you may get help in building your home into a community with like-minded folks.

Soon they will want to expand into a larger community until you’re finally ready to establish your very own Hamlet.
